title: HeyGen HyperFrames 成 Claude 官方连接器，可生成短视频
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
HeyGen has released HyperFrames connector for Claude, allowing users to generate short videos directly from Claude conversations.
The composition agent has 25+ built-in skills that handle typography, motion, captions, and voice, then render to MP4, WebM, or MOV in the cloud.
00:00
HeyGen
@HeyGen
Jun 9
Hyperframes is now an official @ claudeai connector
LLM answers are often dense pages of text that go unread
we partnered with anthropic to fix that, @ HyperFrames_ runs as an mcp where you work
docs get skimmed. video gets understood
proof: this video was made with Hyperframes
00:00
Paid partnership
12:05 PM · Jun 10, 2026 19.7K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: HeyGen HyperFrames 成 Claude 官方连接器，可生成短视频
discovery_record.discovery_summary: HeyGen 发布 HyperFrames 连接器，成为 Claude 官方连接器（与 Anthropic 合作）。用户可在 Claude 对话中直接生成短视频。合成代理内置 25+ 技能，处理排版、运动、字幕和语音，云端渲染输出 MP4、WebM 或 MOV。旨在解决 LLM 回答文本密集、难以阅读的问题，将文档略读转化为视频理解。

key_excerpts.text: HeyGen 发布 HyperFrames 连接器，成为 Claude 官方连接器（与 Anthropic 合作）。用户可在 Claude 对话中直接生成短视频。合成代理内置 25+ 技能，处理排版、运动、字幕和语音，云端渲染输出 MP4、WebM 或 MOV。旨在解决 LLM 回答文本密集、难以阅读的问题，将文档略读转化为视频理解。

The composition agent has 25+ built-in skills that handle typography, motion, captions, and voice, then render to MP4, WebM, or MOV in the cloud.
